xK613","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"author":"K613","details":"DESIGN OVERVIEW --------------- This contract intentionally borrows the economic pattern of Shadow's xToken staking model (receipt token + exit mechanics), while significantly reducing system complexity and attack surface. Core principles: - xK613 is a passive receipt token minted 1:1 on stake and burned on exit. - No rebasing, governance, voting, or vesting logic is included. - Rewards distribution is fully decoupled and handled externally via   RewardsDistributor. SHADOW-INSPIRED ELEMENTS ----------------------- - Receipt-token based staking (K613 \u2192 xK613). - Exit delay enforced via an exit queue. - Optional early exit with penalty (basis-points based). INTENTIONAL DIFFERENCES FROM SHADOW ---------------------------------- - No automatic reward accrual or rebasing. - No epoch-based accounting. - No governance or voting power coupling. - Exit requests escrow xK613 inside this contract, ensuring strict   accounting and preventing double exits. SECURITY RATIONALE ------------------ - Explicit state tracking via UserState prevents balance desynchronization. - xK613 is transferred to this contract during exit requests and burned on exit,   eliminating reliance on user balances at execution time. - All external token transfers use SafeERC20. - ReentrancyGuard is applied to all state-mutating user flows. ECONOMIC NOTES -------------- - Instant exit penalties (if enabled) are minted as xK613 and sent to the   RewardsDistributor, increasing future reward weight for remaining stakers. - Underlying K613 principal is never implicitly redistributed. This design preserves proven economic incentives from Shadow while favoring auditability, explicit user intent, and minimal cross-contract coupling.","errors":{"AccessControlBadConfirmation()":[{"details":"The caller of a function is not the expected one. NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}."}],"AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount(address,bytes32)":[{"details":"The `account` is missing a role."}],"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"events":{"Paused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`."},"RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted to signal this."},"RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call. This account bears the admin role (for the granted role). Expected in cases where the role was granted using the internal {AccessControl-_grantRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)"},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"cancelExit(uint256)":{"params":{"index":"Index of the exit request in the caller's queue."}},"constructor":{"params":{"instantExitPenaltyBps_":"Penalty in basis points for instant exits.","k613Token":"Address of the K613 token to be staked.","lockDuration_":"Lock duration, in seconds, for standard exits.","xk613Token":"Address of the xK613 token to be minted/burned on stake/exit."}},"deposits(address)":{"params":{"user":"Address of the user."},"returns":{"amount":"Total staked K613 amount for the user.","exitQueue":"Array of exit requests for the user."}},"exit(uint256)":{"params":{"index":"Index of the exit request in the caller's queue."}},"exitQueueLength(address)":{"params":{"user":"Address of the user."},"returns":{"_0":"Length of the exit queue."}},"exitRequestAt(address,uint256)":{"params":{"index":"Index of the exit request.","user":"Address of the user."},"returns":{"amount":"Amount requested to exit.","exitInitiatedAt":"Timestamp when the exit was initiated."}},"getRoleAdmin(bytes32)":{"details":"Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}."},"grantRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"initiateExit(uint256)":{"details":"Caller must approve Staking for xK613. At most `MAX_EXIT_REQUESTS` per user.","params":{"amount":"Amount of xK613 to schedule for exit."}},"instantExit(uint256)":{"details":"Requires rewardsDistributor when penalty > 0.","params":{"index":"Index of the exit request in the caller's queue."}},"pause()":{"details":"Functions guarded by `whenNotPaused` will revert while the contract is paused."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"setRewardsDistributor(address)":{"params":{"distributor":"Address of the rewards distributor."}},"stake(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of K613 to convert."}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas."},"withdrawPenalties(address)":{"details":"Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Withdrawable = k613 balance minus total backing.","params":{"to":"Recipient address."}}},"title":"K613 Staking","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"ExitCancelled(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user cancels an exit request."},"ExitInitiated(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user initiates an exit request."},"Exited(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user exits after the lock period."},"InstantExit(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user performs an instant exit."},"PenaltiesWithdrawn(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when penalty K613 is withdrawn."},"RewardsDistributorUpdated(address)":{"notice":"Emitted when rewards distributor is updated."},"Staked(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user stakes K613."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"cancelExit(uint256)":{"notice":"Cancels an exit request and returns xK613 to caller."},"constructor":{"notice":"Initializes the staking contract."},"deposits(address)":{"notice":"Returns the total deposited amount and exit queue for a user."},"exit(uint256)":{"notice":"Executes an exit after the lock period: burns held xK613 and transfers K613 to caller."},"exitQueueLength(address)":{"notice":"Returns the length of the exit queue for a user."},"exitRequestAt(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Returns data for a specific exit request in a user's queue."},"initiateExit(uint256)":{"notice":"Initiates exit: pulls xK613 from caller and adds request to queue."},"instantExit(uint256)":{"notice":"Instant exit before lock period; penalty goes to RewardsDistributor if set."},"instantExitPenaltyBps()":{"notice":"Penalty, in basis points, applied on instant exits before `lockDuration`."},"k613()":{"notice":"Underlying token being staked."},"lockDuration()":{"notice":"Lock duration for standard exits."},"pause()":{"notice":"Pauses staking and exit operations."},"rewardsDistributor()":{"notice":"Rewards distributor responsible for external reward accounting."},"setRewardsDistributor(address)":{"notice":"Sets the rewards distributor contract. Pass address(0) to disable; instant exit with penalty will revert until set."},"stake(uint256)":{"notice":"Converts K613 to xK613 1:1 and mints to caller (XShadow-style)."},"unpause()":{"notice":"Unpauses staking and exit operations."},"withdrawPenalties(address)":{"notice":"Withdraws accumulated penalty K613 (from instant exits) to a recipient."},"withdrawablePenalties()":{"notice":"Returns the amount of penalty K613 available for withdrawal."},"xk613()":{"notice":"xK613 token minted on stake and burned on exit."}},"notice":"Shadow (xSHADOW)-inspired staking contract implementing a 1:1 conversion between K613 and xK613 with an explicit exit queue and optional instant exit penalty .sol":{"keccak256":"0x78e15826a1dafa2d3b5211950eeea62c188e2daf1148d9c7d0071f893884e22f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7f00259219446585cd627880e5c9e0cf496204e85c4c813273e664b188d813a5","dweb:/ipfs/QmRB7SULMEyH5Gn8cLsFso1jCKBcA7Ssj74MsY2WEVTpPz"]},"src/staking/Staking.sol":{"keccak256":"0x67ded144df45a42ed78cc099d3ee8aba909b75056c74e560fef685bced5b8fb4","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://3cbb70973649d8a2f1c4598e16443c962ebd76cfda95950e720c43c4a0a57cdb","dweb:/ipfs/QmNnUz5MoiUFkRYTbQnCv1SYf1TxC9JqNb5czvFYFtAV39"]},"src/token/xK613.sol":{"keccak256":"0x428f24ba861852402726d342b62ee53b56d4bd15da3b0e66c44ea79a3f438450","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a456fc91f2a008c1ae7539ac344377c3041149afc5468124fb2bf20f9ca8f972","dweb:/ipfs/QmW5FRT1mt1BJHwmCADNNGC9orFscXrStwceBvVgnttHYe"]}},"version":1}

params.index: Index of the exit request in the caller's queue.

params.instantExitPenaltyBps_: Penalty in basis points for instant exits.
params.k613Token: Address of the K613 token to be staked.
params.lockDuration_: Lock duration, in seconds, for standard exits.
params.xk613Token: Address of the xK613 token to be minted/burned on stake/exit.

returns.amount: Total staked K613 amount for the user.
returns.exitQueue: Array of exit requests for the user.

params.index: Index of the exit request in the caller's queue.

returns.exitInitiatedAt: Timestamp when the exit was initiated.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

initiateExit(uint256).details: Caller must approve Staking for xK613. At most `MAX_EXIT_REQUESTS` per user.

params.amount: Amount of xK613 to schedule for exit.

params.index: Index of the exit request in the caller's queue.

pause().details: Functions guarded by `whenNotPaused` will revert while the contract is paused.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

withdrawPenalties(address).details: Only callable by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. Withdrawable = k613 balance minus total backing.

cancelExit(uint256).notice: Cancels an exit request and returns xK613 to caller.

deposits(address).notice: Returns the total deposited amount and exit queue for a user.

exit(uint256).notice: Executes an exit after the lock period: burns held xK613 and transfers K613 to caller.

exitQueueLength(address).notice: Returns the length of the exit queue for a user.

exitRequestAt(address,uint256).notice: Returns data for a specific exit request in a user's queue.

initiateExit(uint256).notice: Initiates exit: pulls xK613 from caller and adds request to queue.

instantExit(uint256).notice: Instant exit before lock period; penalty goes to RewardsDistributor if set.

instantExitPenaltyBps().notice: Penalty, in basis points, applied on instant exits before `lockDuration`.

rewardsDistributor().notice: Rewards distributor responsible for external reward accounting.

setRewardsDistributor(address).notice: Sets the rewards distributor contract. Pass address(0) to disable; instant exit with penalty will revert until set.

stake(uint256).notice: Converts K613 to xK613 1:1 and mints to caller (XShadow-style).

withdrawPenalties(address).notice: Withdraws accumulated penalty K613 (from instant exits) to a recipient.

withdrawablePenalties().notice: Returns the amount of penalty K613 available for withdrawal.

xk613().notice: xK613 token minted on stake and burned on exit.
